result.stdout:
Description:
  Cake CLI — build scaffolding and code generation

Usage:
  Cake.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --verbosity <verbosity>  Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install-skill  Install the Claude skill file into the current directory
  create         Create a new project with Cake Frosting build setup
  add-project    Add .NET project(s) from a git repository to the build program's solution generation

commands.payload:
Description:
  Cake CLI — build scaffolding and code generation

Usage:
  Cake.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --verbosity <verbosity>  Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install-skill  Install the Claude skill file into the current directory
  create         Create a new project with Cake Frosting build setup
  add-project    Add .NET project(s) from a git repository to the build program's solution generation

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add .NET project(s) from a git repository to the build program's solution generation

Usage:
  Cake.Cli add-project [options]

Options:
  --git-url <git-url> (REQUIRED)    The git repository URL containing the .NET project(s)
  --projects <projects> (REQUIRED)  The name(s) of the .NET project(s) in the git repository
  --verbosity <verbosity>           Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Add .NET project(s) from a git repository to the build program's solution generation

Usage:
  Cake.Cli add-project [options]

Options:
  --git-url <git-url> (REQUIRED)    The git repository URL containing the .NET project(s)
  --projects <projects> (REQUIRED)  The name(s) of the .NET project(s) in the git repository
  --verbosity <verbosity>           Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Create a new project with Cake Frosting build setup

Usage:
  Cake.Cli create [options]

Options:
  --name <name> (REQUIRED)  The name of the project folder to create
  --force                   Overwrite existing directory if it exists [default: False]
  --verbosity <verbosity>   Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  Cake.Cli create [options]

Options:
  --name <name> (REQUIRED)  The name of the project folder to create
  --force                   Overwrite existing directory if it exists [default: False]
  --verbosity <verbosity>   Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Install the Claude skill file into the current directory

Usage:
  Cake.Cli install-skill [options]

Options:
  --force                  Overwrite existing skill file if it exists [default: False]
  --verbosity <verbosity>  Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
